items.docs: Retrieves details about the currently registered CRM integrations for the account.
Registers a new CRM integration with Gong. A successful registration enables uploading CRM data to Gong. Only one active integration per integration type is allowed.

params.name: integrationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CRM integration to delete.

params.name: clientRequestId
params.description: A client-generated request ID for idempotency.

items.docs: Deletes a registered CRM integration and its associated data from Gong.

params.name: integrationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CRM integration.

params.name: objectType
params.description: The type of CRM object being uploaded (e.g., Deal, Account, Contact, Lead).

params.name: clientRequestId
params.description: A client-generated request ID for tracking.

items.docs: Uploads CRM objects (such as deals, accounts, contacts, or leads) to Gong for association with call data. Objects are uploaded for a specific integration and object type.

params.name: integrationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CRM integration.

params.name: objectType
params.description: The type of CRM object to retrieve.

items.docs: Retrieves CRM objects that have been uploaded to Gong for a specific integration and object type.

params.name: integrationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CRM integration.

params.name: clientRequestId
params.description: The client request ID from the original upload request.

items.docs: Retrieves the status of a previous CRM data upload request using the integration ID and client request ID.

params.name: integrationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CRM integration.

params.name: objectType
params.description: The type of CRM object to get schema for.

items.docs: Retrieves the schema fields defined for a specific CRM object type and integration.
Uploads the schema definition for a CRM object type including field definitions, labels, and data types. This defines the structure of CRM objects that can be uploaded to Gong.
